title: cynanchum lineare subsp. lineare
intro: Cynanchum lineare subsp. lineare, also known as Narrow-leaved Trumpet Vine or Hairy Trumpet Vine, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and potentially lowering blood pressure, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. In herbal preparations, Cynanchum lineare subsp. lineare is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various conditions, including fever and cough.
